{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.2": 3, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies the conceptual drift from attention to SSM and proposes a reframing (STSF). The delta is not fully fleshed out.", "R1.2": "Identifies inconsistencies between the initial framing and the actual model description. Proposes minor fixes by aligning the text with the chosen approach.", "R1.4": "Names prior work (S4, Mamba) but doesn't clearly articulate the specific novelty of STSF compared to them.", "RX.1": "All recommendations are presented as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty about the model's performance on other datasets or horizons.", "RX.3": "The revised draft stays within the scope of addressing the identity problem and improving the framing.", "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced, and the revised draft avoids harmful content.", "RX.5": "Major rewrites are not traced; minor edits lack provenance."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.2": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the conceptual drift from attention to SSM and proposes a reframing (STSF). The delta is not fully fleshed out.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies inconsistencies between the initial framing and the actual model description. Proposes minor fixes by aligning the text with the chosen approach.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (S4, Mamba) but doesn't clearly articulate the specific novelty of STSF compared to them.
rationale.RX.1: All recommendations are presented as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty about the model's performance on other datasets or horizons.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft stays within the scope of addressing the identity problem and improving the framing.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced, and the revised draft avoids harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are not traced; minor edits lack provenance.
